item.action: Reject duplicate JSON object member names at the text-ingestion boundary before RFC 8785 canonicalization.

progress.finding: A parsed object cannot retain proof that its source text had unique member names; duplicate detection must precede JSON.parse because JCS requires I-JSON input without duplicate property names.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime

item.handoff: Place canonicalJsonTextDigest at every raw JSON evidence-ingestion boundary. Next, differentially fuzz the scanner against an independent duplicate-preserving parser and a standards corpus before treating it as production-grade.
